questionHtml:
Howell Industries negotiates a new deal with their mug supplier. Under the new deal, the supplier agrees to discount the cost of each mug based on the number of mugs purchased by Howell Industries. The cost charged by the supplier for each mug can be found using the function

C n=10-0.0001n

where n represents the number of mugs sold by Howell Industries.

Find P'x.
markschemeHtml:
P'x= -2 000x+30 000                    A1A1

Note: Award at most A1A0 if additional terms are seen.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find P'x.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 5.6—Stationary points, local max and min
